queries.question: List bike id and duration from trip records left-joined with station, weather, status where row id is not one of 32, 150, 468, 35, and 196 more.

List end station name from trip records left-joined with station, weather, and status.
queries.sql: SELECT "trip"."end_station_name" FROM "trip" LEFT JOIN "station" ON "trip"."end_station_name" = "station"."name" LEFT JOIN "weather" ON "trip"."zip_code" = "weather"."zip_code" LEFT JOIN "status" ON "trip"."start_station_name" = "status"."station_name";

queries.question: List end station name and start station name from trip records left-joined with station, weather, and status.
queries.sql: SELECT "trip"."end_station_name", "trip"."start_station_name" FROM "trip" LEFT JOIN "station" ON "trip"."end_station_name" = "station"."name" LEFT JOIN "weather" ON "trip"."zip_code" = "weather"."zip_code" LEFT JOIN "status" ON "trip"."start_station_name" = "status"."station_name";
